name: Aegislash
description: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

abilities.name: Miracle Guard
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Protect Charge
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to this Pokémon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Mr. Mime
description: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

attacks.name: Trick
attacks.effect: Move a Pokémon Tool card attached to 1 of either player's Pokémon to another of that player's Pokémon that doesn't already have a Pokémon Tool attached to it. If there is no Pokémon to move the Pokémon Tool card to, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Lock Up
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Marill
description: The tip of its tail is filled with oil that is lighter than water, so it acts as a float.

name: Azumarill
description: The bubble-like pattern on its stomach helps it camouflage itself when it's in the water.

attacks.name: Bubble Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Superpower
attacks.effect: You may do 30 more damage. If you do, this Pokémon does 30 damage to itself.

name: Azumarill
description: The bubble-like pattern on its stomach helps it camouflage itself when it's in the water.

abilities.name: α Recovery
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is healed, double the amount healed.

attacks.name: Tail Rap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dwindling Wave
attacks.effect: This attack does 100 damage minus 10 damage for each damage counter on this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Life Leap
attacks.effect: Heal from this Pokémon the same amount of damage you did to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Shining Wind
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, this Pokémon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Brilliant Arrow
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage times the amount of Fairy Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

name: Kingdra
description: It stores energy by sleeping at underwater depths at which no other life forms can survive.

attacks.name: Shred
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by any effects on your opponent's Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Twister
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. For each heads, discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon. If both of them are tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Kingdra
description: It stores energy by sleeping at underwater depths at which no other life-forms can survive.

abilities.name: α Growth
abilities.effect: When you attach an Energy card from your hand to this Pokémon (except with an attack, Ability, or Trainer card), you may attach 2 Energy cards.

attacks.name: Gather Strength
attacks.effect: Search your deck for up to 4 basic Energy cards, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Dragon Blast
attacks.effect: Discard a Water Energy and a Lightning Energy attached to this Pokémon.

name: Vibrava
description: It generates ultrasonic waves by violently flapping its wings. After making its prey faint, it melts the prey with acid.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Flygon
description: Known as "The Desert Spirit," this Pokémon hides in the sandstorms it causes by beating its wings.

abilities.name: Sand Flap
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may choose either player. That player shuffles his or her hand into his or her deck and draws 4 cards.

attacks.name: Sand Tomb
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Zigzagoon
description: A Pokémon with abundant curiosity. It shows an interest in everything, so it always zigzags.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Linoone
description: It charges prey at speeds over 60 mph. However, because it can only run straight, it often fails.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Dash Attack
attacks.effect: This attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Skitty
description: It shows its cute side by chasing its own tail until it gets dizzy.

attacks.name: Charm
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Delcatty
description: It is highly popular among female Trainers for its sublime fur. It does not keep a nest.

attacks.name: Replace
attacks.effect: Move as many Energy attached to your Pokémon to your other Pokémon in any way you like.

attacks.name: Play Rough
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Spinda
description: The chances of two Spinda having identical spot patterns is less than one in four billion.

attacks.name: Staggering Steps
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Confused. If tails, this Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Uproar
attacks.effect: This attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Bidoof
description: It constantly gnaws on logs and rocks to whittle down its front teeth. It nests alongside water.

attacks.name: Scrunch
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to this Pokémon by attacks during your opponent's next turn.

name: Bidoof
description: It constantly gnaws on logs and rocks to whittle down its front teeth. It nests alongside water.

abilities.name: α Recovery
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon is healed, double the amount healed.

attacks.name: Drench
attacks.effect: If this Pokémon has any Water Energy attached to it, this attack does 20 more damage.

name: Bibarel
description: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.

attacks.name: Yawn
attacks.effect: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Continuous Headbutt
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 80 damage times the number of heads.

name: Bouffalant
description: Their fluffy fur absorbs damage, even if they strike foes with a fierce headbutt.

abilities.name: Sap Sipper
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's attacks do 40 more damage to your opponent's Grass Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Derail
attacks.effect: Discard a Special Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.

name: Bunnelby
description: It has ears like shovels. Digging holes strengthens its ears so much that they can sever thick roots effortlessly.

attacks.name: Trip Over
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 more damage.

name: Bunnelby
description: It has ears like shovels. Digging holes strengthens its ears so much that they can sever thick roots effortlessly.

abilities.name: Ω Barrage
abilities.effect: This Pokémon may attack twice a turn. (If the first attack Knocks Out your opponent's Active Pokémon, you may attack again after your opponent chooses a new Active Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Burrow
attacks.effect: Discard the top card of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Rototiller
attacks.effect: Shuffle a card from your discard pile into your deck.

name: Acro Bike
effect: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put 1 of them into your hand. Discard the other card.

name: Aggron Spirit Link
effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Aggron-EX.

name: Archie's Ace in the Hole
effect:
You can play this card only when it is the last card in your hand.

Put a {W} Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench. Then, draw 5 cards.

name: Dive Ball
effect: Search your deck for a Water Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Energy Retrieval
effect: Put 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Escape Rope
effect: Each player switches his or her Active Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon. (Your opponent switches first. If a player does not have a Benched Pokémon, he or she doesn't switch Pokémon.)

name: Exp. Share
effect: When your Active Pokémon is Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack, you may move 1 basic Energy card that was attached to that Pokémon to the Pokémon this card is attached to.

name: Fresh Water Set
effect: Heal 20 damage from each of your Pokémon.

name: Gardevoir Spirit Link
effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes M Gardevoir-EX.

name: Groudon Spirit Link
effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes Primal Groudon-EX.

name: Kyogre Spirit Link
effect: Your turn does not end if the Pokémon this card is attached to becomes Primal Kyogre-EX.

name: Maxie's Hidden Ball Trick
effect:
You can play this card only when it is the last card in your hand.

Put a {F} Pokémon from your discard pile onto your Bench. Then, draw 5 cards.

name: Professor Birch's Observations
effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck and flip a coin. If heads, draw 7 cards. If tails, draw 4 cards.

name: Rare Candy
effect: Choose 1 of your Basic Pokémon in play. If you have a Stage 2 card in your hand that evolves from that Pokémon, put that card on the Basic Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) You can't use this card during your first turn or on a Basic Pokémon that was put into play this turn.

name: Repeat Ball
effect: Search your deck for a Pokémon with the same name as 1 of your Pokémon in play, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Rough Seas
effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may heal 30 damage from each of his or her Water Pokémon and Lightning Pokémon.

name: Scorched Earth
effect: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard a Fire or Fighting Energy card from his or her hand. If that player does so, he or she draws 2 cards.

name: Shrine of Memories
effect: Each player's evolved Pokémon can use any attack from its previous Evolutions. (That player still needs the necessary Energy to use each attack.)

name: Silent Lab
effect: Each Basic Pokémon in play, in each player's hand, and in each player's discard pile has no Abilities.

name: Teammates
effect:
You can play this card only if 1 of your Pokémon was Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn.

Search your deck for up to 2 cards and put them into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Weakness Policy
effect: The Pokémon this card is attached to has no Weakness.

name: Shield Energy
effect:
This card can only be attached to Metal Pokémon. This card provides Metal Energy only while this card is attached to a Metal Pokémon.

The attacks of your opponent's Pokémon do 10 less damage to the Metal Pokémon this card is attached to (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Metal Pokémon, discard this card.)

name: Wonder Energy
effect:
This card can only be attached to Fairy Pokémon. This card provides Fairy Energy only while this card is attached to a Fairy Pokémon.

Prevent all effects of your opponent's attacks, except damage, done to the Fairy Pokémon this card is attached to. (Existing effects are not removed.)

(If this card is attached to anything other than a Fairy Pokémon, discard this card.)

attacks.effect: If there is any Stadium card in play, this attack does 100 more damage. Discard that Stadium card.
